process_cleanup.note: No local wrapper/modal/python processes matching the V9 2DGS, MASt3R-SLAM, or Hair-GS backend smokes remained at final cleanup.

v9_reality_audit.verdict: Prior V8 A5-X/B-hand10/B-hair3 positives were proxy/smoke unless backed by later true-backend runs.

cloud_asset_staging.verdict: Remote research assets verified: query cache, template payload, VGGT tokens, 60 images/masks, cameras, and priors; procedural fallback disabled.

cloud_a_b_fus3d3_real_asset_preflight.verdict: Real staged assets used and procedural fallback was not used; remains research preflight, not candidate.

a5x2_must3r_true_backend.verdict: Official MUSt3R produced nonempty weak-pool pointmaps, but alignment/known-camera/region gates did not pass strict teacher intake.

a5x2_2dgs_colmap_scene.verdict: 2DGS read the staged known-camera COLMAP scene with 6 cameras and 301056 weak-pool initial points, then completed 30 train iterations.

mast3r_slam_true_backend.verdict: Official MASt3R-SLAM main.py returned 0 on staged 4K4D PNG input and wrote logs, trajectory, and PLY; PLY has 0 vertices, so this is a backend decision smoke, not usable geometry.

hair_gs_dependency_fix2.verdict: Hair-GS imports on Modal with cu118/torch2.0/gcc11/sm86; CUDA rasterizer, simple-knn, PyTorch3D, and HairGaussianModel import passed. Next blocker is FLAME and hair dataset conversion.

d_line_guard_and_referee.verdict: Formal cloud still blocked; research-only artifacts clean.

reasons: A5-X2 MUSt3R is real and nonempty but weak-pool only; known-camera/reprojection/region gates have not passed.
B-hand11 real VGGT+hand-token decoder is unavailable; B-hand10 proxy cannot satisfy hand ownership.
B-hair4 real HairGS topology backend is unavailable; B-hair3 proxy cannot satisfy hairline/head-top ownership.

final_verdict: V9 executable work was landed and run to current true blockers. Research cloud is allowed; formal cloud train/infer/export, teacher export, candidate export, predictions export, registry writes, and strict pass writes remain blocked.
